faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Whether you're hunting for a modern apartment or a quiet house in the suburbs, our listings have something for everyone.
faq.q1Q: How do I start the buying process?
faq.q1A: Start by browsing listings. When you find a property you like, click "Check availability" and an agent will reach out to schedule a visit and guide you through the next steps.
faq.q2Q: What types of properties do you offer?
faq.q2A: We handle apartments, houses, land, commercial spaces, offices, and warehouses across different areas. Use the type filter at the top to narrow your search.
faq.q3Q: Can I buy a property with no down payment?
faq.q3A: Some projects offer flexible payment plans. We recommend contacting the project's agent for the specific terms.
faq.q4Q: How do I know if a property is a good investment?
faq.q4A: Your agent can share residential demand data, comparables, and project projections. Any rental yield projection is referential and does not guarantee future income. We can coordinate a technical visit with a specialist if you need.
faq.q5Q: Can you help me sell my property?
faq.q5A: Yes. Contact us from the form at the bottom of the page and we'll assign you an agent who will evaluate your property and propose a listing strategy.
faq.q6Q: How do I schedule a visit?
faq.q6A: From each property page you can request a guided visit. The responsible agent will reach out within 24 hours to coordinate.
faq.q7Q: Do you offer financing or loans?
faq.q7A: We have partnerships with several financial institutions. Your assigned agent can guide you through the options based on your profile.
faq.q8Q: What documents do I need to buy?
faq.q8A: The basics are valid ID, proof of income, and bank references. For mortgage financing, the bank will request additional documentation.

contactOwner.quote1Body: I got the valuation with comparables in 24 hours. We closed in 6 weeks at the suggested price.

disclaimers.price: Price and availability subject to confirmation.
disclaimers.closingCosts: Sale price doesn't include closing costs, legal fees, transfer taxes, or financing costs unless otherwise stated.
disclaimers.approximateLocation: We show an approximate location for privacy. The exact address is shared once a visit is coordinated.
disclaimers.documentation: Legal and registry information must be verified with up-to-date documentation before submitting an offer or signing a contract.
disclaimers.shortTermRental: Short-term rental use must be validated against the condo regulations, applicable permits, and current tax obligations.
disclaimers.investment: Any rental yield projection is referential and does not guarantee future income.
disclaimers.privacy: We'll only use your data to respond to this inquiry and follow up on this property. You can request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data.
disclaimers.rentalTerms: Expected stay set by the owner. Final term, adjustments, and conditions are defined by the contract and applicable law.
